title: DissolvA: Predictive Dissolution Suite
description: A web-based pharmaceutical dissolution analysis platform: FDA/EMA guidance-aligned f1/f2 similarity, 62 kinetic models, bootstrap f2, USP monograph compliance checks, and professional reporting. Proprietary software, available as a hosted service at https://www.dissolva.app. This record is a citable software description; it contains no source code.

creators.name: Kaynak, Mustafa Sinan
creators.affiliation: Anadolu University, Faculty of Pharmacy, Department of Pharmaceutical Technology, Eskişehir, Türkiye
